title: vatica javanica
intro: Vatica javanica, also known as Borneo ironwood or keruing, is a species of tree native to the tropical forests of Borneo and Sumatra. The medicinal properties of Vatica javanica include its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Vatica javanica can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
